name: Smolensk Oblast (Russia)

colors.symbolism: the historic colour of Smolensk; courage and the blood shed defending the western frontier of Russia

description: A red field charged in the centre with the coat of arms of Smolensk Oblast: a black cannon with a gold bird of paradise (gamayun) standing on it.
history: The flag of Smolensk Oblast was adopted on 26 May 1998. The arms reproduce the historical emblem of Smolensk, granted in the 17th-18th centuries, recalling the city's role as a fortified gateway to Moscow.

features.symbolism: the red field, drawn from the historic Smolensk arms, recalls the city's long status as a frontier fortress and the blood shed in its defence.
a black cannon on a green carriage with a gold bird of paradise (gamayun) perched on it, the historic arms of Smolensk.
